SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH WALSH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WADDLE IN INC.DBA AS VANGUARD PROPERTY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KORY POWELL-MCCOY, PORTFOLIO MANAGER. DEFENDANT KORY POWELL-MCCOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS KRISCHE IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON KORY POWELL-MCCOY AND LUIS KRISCHE. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HIS CASE ON KORY POWELL-MCCOY AND LUIS KRISCHE AND GO FORWARD ON CASE AGAINST VANGUARD PROPERTY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
